source: Montini 2006, Cavazzana-Calvo 2010, Brown 2007, Zufferey 1998, SIN-LV safety data
description: Expected findings for lentiviral/retroviral gene therapy vectors. Integrating vector with VSV-G pseudotyping. NO DRG toxicity (AAV-specific). Requires 15-year LTFU, RCL testing, and integration site analysis.

expected_findings.rationale: Lymphocyte margination/migration to liver following IV administration of VSV-G-pseudotyped vector.

expected_findings.mechanism: TLR9 activation by VSV-G/tubulovesicular structures via plasmacytoid dendritic cells
expected_findings.rationale: Innate immune sensing of lentiviral particles via TLR9. Peaks 4-6h post-dose, resolves within 24h.
Innate immune sensing of lentiviral particles.
Kupffer cell/macrophage phagocytosis of lentiviral particles.
Humoral response to envelope glycoprotein. Variable titer.
Rapid phagocytosis of lentiviral particles by liver macrophages. Occurs within minutes post-IV.

expected_findings.typical_magnitude: Slight (3.2-3.7x vs 4.2x fold gain in controls)

expected_findings.severity_threshold: >25% spleen weight increase over controls = monitor

expected_findings.typical_magnitude: ~1 copy/diploid genome for ex vivo HSPC
expected_findings.rationale: Integration efficiency marker. Monitored by qPCR across multiple tissues.

expected_findings.severity_threshold: Any clone >20% of ISA reads = clonal dominance concern
expected_findings.rationale: SIN-LV shows benign integration bias. No clonal dominance expected. (Zynteglo/BB305 ISA data confirmed polyclonal reconstitution.)

expected_findings.description: No hepatocyte necrosis (lentiviral alone does not injure hepatocytes)
expected_findings.severity_threshold: Any necrosis = unexpected finding — investigate for AAV contamination or disease
expected_findings.rationale: Key distinction from AAV: lentiviral vectors alone do not cause hepatocyte necrosis/degeneration in healthy animals.

expected_findings.description: No DRG pathology (AAV-specific, absent in lentiviral)
expected_findings.severity_threshold: Any DRG findings = unexpected — investigate for AAV contamination or misclassification
expected_findings.rationale: Lentiviral vectors lack AAV-mediated DRG tropism. DRG pathology is AAV-specific.

expected_findings.description: No tumors expected with SIN-LV design
expected_findings.severity_threshold: Any tumor above background incidence = investigate
expected_findings.rationale: Low genotoxicity of SIN-LV confirmed by IVIM assay. Montini et al. showed no dose-dependent tumor acceleration in Cdkn2a-/- tumor-prone mice.
